The 2023-2024 Spring Semester Online Exhibition featuring student works from the Faculty of Art and Design is now live on the FADPORT platform! To view the exhibition: https://fadport.khas.edu.tr

Our physical exhibition titled KHAS FAD SUMMER SHOW is also in Block C,

You can see it at the Faculty of Art and Design.
